## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check src tests` passes
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] New behavior has a test (see the fake model pattern in `tests/`)
- [ ] User visible changes update the README
- [ ] Any new feature still works with the optional dependency missing
